mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (user1_id, user2_id, last_message, last_message_time, user1_unread, user2_unread, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{user1Unread}, #{user2Unread}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, user1_unread = #{user1Unread}, user2_unread = #{user2Unread}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE user1_id = #{user1Id} AND user2_id = #{user2Id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE user1_id = #{userId} OR user2_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_message_time DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
